zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Preston於大約1534年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，她的父親Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston33歲，母親Catherine Fitzgerald25歲。她於1554年與Thomas Fleming在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年12月10日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯享年65歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Preston于大约1534年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，她的父亲Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston33岁，母亲Catherine Fitzgerald25岁。她于1554年与Thomas Fleming在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年12月10日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯享年65岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Preston was born about 1534, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston, was 33 and her mother, Catherine Fitzgerald, was 25. She married Thomas Fleming in 1554, in County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 10 December 1598, in County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 65, and was buried in Slane, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Preston est née environ 1534, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catherine Fitzgerald, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fleming en 1554, à County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 décembre 1598, à County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Slane, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Preston um 1534 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston 33 und ihre Mutter Catherine Fitzgerald 25. Sie hat 1554 in County Meath, Irland Thomas Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Dezember 1598 im Alter von 65 Jahren in County Meath, Irland und wurde in Slane, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Preston è nata il circa 1534 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Catherine Fitzgerald, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fleming nel 1554, nel County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 10 dicembre 1598, nel County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダア
ja.Slane, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアススラン

ja.Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストン
ja.County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアス
ja.Gormanston Castle, Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストン
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Prestonが約1534年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanstonは33歳，母Catherine Fitzgeraldは25歳であった。1554年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスでThomas Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年12月10日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで65歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアススランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Preston(이)가 대략 1534년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Fitzgerald(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1554년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 Thomas Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 12월 10일 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Preston nasceu aproximadamente 1534, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Fitzgerald, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fleming em 1554, em County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1598, em County Meath, Irlanda, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Preston родилась около 1534 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Fitzgerald, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fleming в 1554 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 декабря 1598 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Preston nació aproximadamente 1534, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Jenico Preston 3rd Viscount Gormanston, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catherine Fitzgerald, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thomas Fleming en 1554, en County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1598, en County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.
